overrides.expect: y _ {i j} ^ {\text {old}} = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} y _ {i j} & \text {if y_{ij} is observed} \\ \mathrm{E} (y _ {i j} | y _ {\text {obs}}, \theta^ {\text {old}}) & \text {if y_{ij} is missing,} \end{array} \right.
overrides.new: y _ {i j} ^ {\text {old}} = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} y _ {i j} & \text {if } y_{ij} \text { is observed} \\ \mathrm{E} (y _ {i j} | y _ {\text {obs}}, \theta^ {\text {old}}) & \text {if } y_{ij} \text { is missing,} \end{array} \right.
